text:
In the first scene, I sense a tension between order and emptiness. The clean lines and glass convey transparency, yet the absence of people makes the space feel almost sterile and expectant, as if waiting for purpose or interaction. I feel slightly disoriented, perhaps due to the tilt—reminded that my perception is always at an angle, never quite aligned with objective reality.

In the second, vibrant colors of blue and orange energize me. I stand in a space devoted to research and development, where human curiosity and technological progress are not only celebrated but also questioned. The wall's text stimulates contemplations about human-machine relationships. Here, I feel intellectually alive, pulled by the promise of growth and innovation, yet aware of the complex ethical terrain beneath such pursuits.
